content.en:
The Godless City Lord was dumbfounded, a half-step Eternal Controller was even stronger than him.

He originally thought that Ye Tian only dared to be so arrogant because of his deep background, but now he knew that Ye Tian's real confidence was his own strength.

With the cultivation of a half-step Eternal Master, the combat power of the Eternal Master is comparable to that of the Eternal Master, which is almost in rumors, and this time I have really seen it.

However, such a demon came to kill him.

"Who the hell are you, and why did you kill me?"

The Godless City Lord roared angrily.

"Endless Lord, Ye Tian!"

Ye Tian reported his identity.

Endless Lord?

The godless lord seemed to have heard this name somewhere, and quickly remembered that he had broken through the demon of the ninth layer of the Half-tooth Ancient Tower, but he didn't expect to grow to a level even stronger than him so quickly.

The Godless City Lord wanted to escape, but Ye Tian's space-time forbidden domain blocked this place, and with his strength, he couldn't get rid of Ye Tian.

Gradually, he began to get hurt.

Ye Tian's Hundred Realms Stick and Thousand Dao Kills were too terrifying, and the godless city lord couldn't stop it, and the controlling body on his body gradually began to collapse.

Inside the Godless City.

19 Cai Li stood on top of a tall building, her eyes looked through the void at the battle in the boundary river, although she couldn't see the battle between Ye Tian and the godless city lord clearly, but some people could roughly see that they were also discussing, so she could know how the battle was going.

"That Lord is even more powerful than the Godless City Lord!!"

Caili was shocked.

All these years, she has been a guide for this adult!

"If the godless city lord is dead, it will be fine!"

Centrifugal thinking.

In fact, she wasn't the only one who thought so, but many cultivators in the Godless City thought so.

It's just that their true spirit core is controlled by the godless city lord, and they can control their life and death with a single thought, no matter where they flee into, it is useless.

But once the godless city lord is dead, they have hope of regaining their freedom.

Thundered!!!

In the Boundary River, the battle between Ye Tian and the Godless City Lord disrupted the endless time and space, and the time and space were shattered everywhere.

The body of the Godless City Lord was shattered again and again by Ye Tian's Hundred Realms Stick, but after all, it was the Eternal Master, so it was difficult to kill.

Soon, the godless city lord felt that he was about to lose his bearing.

There's a real chance he'll fall!

However, he used one treasure after another to escape, but he couldn't escape.

The top-notch space-time control technique was too powerful, and even he hadn't comprehended a top-notch space-time control technique, otherwise, he wouldn't be at the bottom of the eternal master.

A little more passed.

Under Ye Tian's attack of another Thousand Dao Killing, the body of the Godless City Lord was completely shattered, and although it condensed again, its will was annihilated and turned into a corpse.

Godless City Lord, it's fallen!

After killing the Godless City Lord, Ye Tian took out a treasure from the Godless City Lord's body, which was a treasure similar to a tree.

This tree has gathered an endless core of will, it is a treasure that controls countless living beings, and it is the reason why the Godless City Lord accidentally obtained it and was able to control so many peak Legendary Realm Lords.

Moreover, without a will core, even a half-step Eternal Master, unable to break through to the Eternal Mastery in a lifetime.

Now that he has killed the Godless City Lord, let's release the will core of these creatures by the way.

"Broken!"

Ye Tian crushed the tree, and countless will cores broke free from the shackles of the tree and drifted back to their own body one by one.

Godless City.

Countless cultivators sensed that their will core had returned, and they were immediately excited.

"Thank you, senior!"

Countless practitioners kowtowed in thanks.

At this time, even those guards who originally belonged to the loyal command of the godless city lord also regained their freedom, and their expressions were extremely complicated.

You know, they have offended a lot of people, and I'm afraid it's not easy.

If Ye Tian hadn't left, otherwise they would definitely have fled as soon as possible.

Ye Tian didn't care about the rest of the matter, he left here directly.

......

"I have passed the second test of that great being, what is the third test?"

Ye Tian was curious.

Just when Ye Tian was curious, he found that the space-time around him began to distort, and his replica body left this area uncontrollably, spanning an incomparably long distance, and came to another space-time area.

This place definitely doesn't belong to the Thirteenth Boundary River, but somewhere in the Origin Boundary Sea.

Here he saw a middle-aged man.

This person sat cross-legged on a futon, and seemed to be sitting there, but Ye Tian didn't sense his existence, and a consciousness in the dark told him that there was a person sitting there.

"What a terrifying strength!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

"I've seen my seniors!"

Ye Tian said hello.

"Little one, you're very nice and lucky!"

The middle-aged man said with a smile.

Ye Tian's expression moved, guessing that his copying talent was afraid that he had been insightful.

This is how he feels!

Moreover, this is the first time he has been thoroughly insighted.

At this time, the other party said: "Don't panic, no one can take away your chance, everyone has their own chance." Let's introduce myself first, people call me the Ten Elements Ancestor, you are not my disciple now, you can also call me the Ten Elements Ancestor. This time, I sensed that you had completed the two tests I had set, so I brought you here. "

"If you want to become my personal disciple, I can arrange a third test now, and if you don't want to, I can give you a great opportunity to end this cause and effect. "

After the Ten Elements Ancestor finished speaking, he waited for Ye Tian's answer.

Ye Tian did not hesitate at all, and said directly: "Ten Elements Ancestor, I am willing to accept the third test. "

He knew very well that such a great existence as the Ten Elements Ancestor, even the registered disciples were the eternal masters of the level of the half-tooth master, and he was definitely the top existence in the world.

Although he has the talent of copying, the copying of Heaven 923 Fu only makes his talent improve, and it does not mean that he can grow to the level of the Ten Elements Ancestor in the future.

For example, if it weren't for the two secret methods left by the Ten Elements Ancestor, he would not have such strength now, and maybe he would only be able to become the level of the half-tooth master in the future.

Therefore, if you are apprenticed to the Ten Elements Ancestor, you will have the hope of climbing to a higher level in the future.

"Very good, you made the right choice. No matter how talented you are, if you take the wrong step, your future achievements are limited. There is never a shortage of people in the world who have talent and atmospheric luck, but the existence that can truly grow to the peak of the Origin Realm Sea does not only rely on talent and atmospheric luck, but also on background and luck. "

"I'll assign you a third test now, and if you complete it, you'll be my fifth personal disciple!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor took out eight scrolls and handed them to Ye Tian.

"There are eight other secret techniques on this, no less than the secret of swallowing and the secret of enlightenment that you cultivate, you need to practice them all, and finally combine the eight secret techniques to create a secret technique that surpasses them. "

"Remember, don't attack the Eternal Master until you do that. "

"If you succeed, you can become my fifth personal disciple!"

After the Ten Elements Ancestor finished speaking, he disappeared.

And Ye Tian came back to his senses and returned to the place of the Thirteenth Boundary River again, if it weren't for the eight more scrolls in his hand, he even thought it was an illusion just now.

"The third test of the Ten Elements Ancestor is too difficult!"

Ye Tian thought. _
